finding_results.notes: Reworked the confrontation so Vel's answers repeatedly trigger Kem-local processing: arithmetic recoil, bodily hum, memory collision, recognition of the delayed disclosure, and re-reading of earlier care as mixed motive. The reveal no longer runs in extended exterior-only dialogue blocks.
Removed the repeated 'softness-to-callus / no-longer-Vault-hands' realization. The callus now functions as physical friction on the pack strap and later splits during the grain-shed labor.

Expanded the chapter to 7127 words by adding two consequential post-reveal sequences: the grain-shed salvage scene and the weigh-station/night-walk sequence. The added material increases pressure, proves the fractured alliance in action, and preserves the Chapter 14 handoff.

summary: Chapter 13 now exceeds the minimum word count, threads Kem's interiority through the Vel confrontation, replaces the redundant callus recognition with physical-action beats, and adds consequential no-spend aftermath material that keeps the alliance fractured but intact before Chapter 14.
